prompt: Add a 'Dark Mode' toggle switch in the top right corner of the interface.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, a screenshot of a music application interface. Add a functional 'Dark Mode' toggle switch UI element in the top-right corner of the interface. The switch should seamlessly integrate with the existing dark user interface design.
objects: Main content area with song list
Music playback controls at the bottom
Functional 'Dark Mode' toggle switch UI element in the top-right corner
